title: Fungus Stew
description: Fungus stew made by nether fungus
body:
## Fungus Stew

A new food item called "Fungus Stew" has been added. 

It has the same satiety restoration as Mushroom Stew, but provides 30 seconds of fire resistance after consumption. 

It is crafted from one bowl, one Wrapped Fungus, and one Crimson Fungus.
